teams.name: First Team
teams.description: Our flagship senior side, competing in the local Saturday league. Training Tuesday and Thursday evenings.

teams.name: Reserves
teams.description: Providing competitive football and a development pathway into the first team. A great environment for players looking to step up.

teams.name: Ladies
teams.description: Our ladies team competes in the local women's league. New players of all abilities are always welcome — come along to a session.

teams.name: Under 6s
teams.description: Our youngest players taking their first steps in football. Fun, non-competitive sessions focused on enjoyment and basic skills.

teams.name: Under 7s
teams.description: Small-sided games and skill drills for our U7s. A brilliant introduction to the game in a fun, friendly environment.

teams.name: Under 8s
teams.description: Building on the basics with more structured play and introductory mini-league fixtures against local clubs.

teams.name: Under 9s
teams.description: Developing technique, teamwork, and a love for the game. Regular training and competitive fixtures throughout the season.

teams.name: Under 10s
teams.description: Stepping up to bigger pitches and full season league competition. A key development age group for young players.

teams.name: Under 11s
teams.description: Competitive league football with a continued focus on player development and enjoying the game.

teams.name: Under 12s
teams.description: Moving into the transition phase of youth football. Strong emphasis on tactical awareness and individual development.

teams.name: Under 13s
teams.description: Full-size pitches and competitive league and cup football. A pivotal age group in our youth development pathway.

teams.name: Under 14s
teams.description: High-quality youth football for our older juniors, developing players with an eye towards the senior game.
